active_cycle.goal: Drive larger bounded post-refactor responsive-tree architecture tasks while preserving evidence, pilot, and readiness boundaries.

tasks.title: Reset post-refactor active queue
tasks.objective: Archive the old pre-refactor active queue lineage as non-authoritative history and establish this post-refactor responsive-tree active queue.
allowed_work: Inventory queue, ledger, control-plane, schemas, validators, and workflow state.
Preserve legacy queue and ledger history as non-authoritative history.
Replace the active queue driver with post-refactor RTAQ tasks.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness or validation claims.
acceptance_criteria: Old RQ-0023 through RQ-0026 lineage no longer drives the active queue.
Historical queue and ledger lineage remains preserved or explicitly referenced as archived history.
Post-refactor active queue uses RTAQ task IDs.
Queue and ledger validators pass.

critique_findings: The old RQ pending lineage must remain archived history and must not drive post-refactor execution.
CI success and queue completion remain repository bookkeeping only, not responsive correctness evidence.
completion.boundary: No submitted evidence, Issue #8 mutation, real pilot execution, or readiness claim upgrade.

tasks.title: Submitted packet eligibility gate hardening
tasks.objective: Add one broader eligibility gate covering issue-reference consistency, submitted-state consistency, stale-state rejection, sample-marker rejection, and placeholder-hash rejection for submitted packets.
allowed_work: Add or extend bounded validators for issue_reference consistency and Issue #8 reference lock.
Require issue_url_or_ref and submitted evidence status consistency for eligibility.
Reject stale states, sample markers, and placeholder hashes from submitted eligibility.
Add negative fixtures for each coupled failure mode and wire them into CI.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness or validation claims.
acceptance_criteria: Wrong or missing Issue #8 reference cannot pass submitted eligibility.
Stale or invalid evidence submission status cannot pass submitted eligibility.
Sample markers and placeholder hashes cannot pass submitted eligibility.
CI passes without real evidence execution.

critique_findings: Gemini correctly identified a misleading rejection path for missing or non-string payload_identity_hash.
The validator now rejects missing or invalid payload identity hashes with a specific payload identity hash error before placeholder-hash checks.
CI success remains repository-check evidence only, not responsive correctness evidence.
completion.boundary: No submitted evidence, Issue #8 mutation, real pilot execution, readiness claim upgrade, or production/release claim upgrade.

tasks.title: Controlled-use readiness snapshot and first-run guide
tasks.objective: Create one evidence-bounded controlled-use readiness snapshot plus first-run guide for manual use without upgrading production, release, or validation claims.
allowed_work: Write a controlled-use readiness statement with explicit non-production and non-release boundaries.
Document manual first-run inputs, outputs, stop conditions, evidence blockers, and validation command index.
Keep Issue #8 evidence-pending and pilot-blocked state explicit.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not claim production, release, live render, export, accessibility, or pixel validation.
acceptance_criteria: Snapshot states controlled-use boundaries only.
Guide supports controlled manual use only.
Real pilot remains blocked and CI success is repository-check evidence only.

tasks.title: Guarded handoff pack and drift audit
tasks.objective: Create a guarded handoff pack and audit repository drift across queue, status, master spec, contracts, schemas, validators, and CI boundary text.
allowed_work: Package active contracts, schemas, validators, and manual-use boundaries.
Audit queue, STATUS, PROJECT_MASTER_SPEC, docs, and validators for drift.
Document CI boundary and next evidence blockers.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade validation or readiness claims.
acceptance_criteria: Handoff pack is guarded by explicit evidence boundaries.
Queue/status/master-spec drift is checked and documented.
Issue #8 remains evidence-pending and real pilot remains blocked.

tasks.title: Refresh accelerated RTA queue
tasks.objective: Audit RTAQ-0001 through RTAQ-0004, restore pending depth, and reconcile ledger/status/docs while preserving evidence and pilot boundaries.
allowed_work: Review merged outcomes and CI status for RTAQ-0001 through RTAQ-0004.
Refresh the active queue with larger bounded tasks and at least four pending tasks.
Reconcile ledger, STATUS, docs, and queue state.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness or validation claims.
acceptance_criteria: RTAQ-0001 through RTAQ-0004 are audited.
Pending depth is restored.
Evidence-pending and pilot-blocked boundaries remain visible.

tasks.title: Post-refresh execution boundary hardening
tasks.objective: Reserve the first post-refresh bounded task slot for hardening any execution-boundary drift identified by RTAQ-0005 without creating evidence or authorizing pilot work.
allowed_work: Harden docs, validators, queue, ledger, or status records only when RTAQ-0005 identifies bounded execution-boundary drift.
Keep the task narrow and evidence-boundary preserving.
Use branch, PR, CI, and critique workflow before merge.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness, production, release, live-render, export, accessibility, or pixel claims.
expected_artifacts: Bounded post-refresh hardening patch if RTAQ-0005 identifies drift
acceptance_criteria: Task is only executed after RTAQ-0005 refresh completes.
Any patch is limited to bounded execution-boundary drift.
Evidence-pending and pilot-blocked boundaries remain visible.
